{"projectId":"929484233158471895","sessionId":"8380763720796391741","outputComponents":[{"design":{"screens":[{"screenshot":{"name":"projects/929484233158471895/files/f01f2e146e534e4c8bc663a8161cb486","downloadUrl":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida/AP1WRLsNToESg37OHDmEpANpVS_x_NOrV4w18wq7QegRnnOZmArLjL4mgneGRkuXT7qAwNZaJFAYYf3XuVrYiJmo9Dhi_RvG3XIq95IZZy2w1-dFpW1Xcvd9GcmnCO0tq5HUZ3BxQHVmDphm_-sAvw7dAcjO82Go2LPBN8j6G6WWAEubxC3pYj2pCL8EocU6cNlhEwyRg5-tBVDqmaWgsueK-smFzS3Fz0tp6xFVKmDd6yWfy35Cz0pZJhtZ-g"},"htmlCode":{"name":"projects/929484233158471895/files/87aa318ac4014e71ae2489eae85f70e1","downloadUrl":"https://contribution.usercontent.google.com/download?c=CgthaWRhX2NvZGVmeBJ6Eh1hcHBfY29tcGFuaW9uX2dlbmVyYXRlZF9maWxlcxpZCiVodG1sXzA5NDQ1Nzc1ZjdmNjQzYWI4NmRiODJkMjU4ZWFkNWUzEgsSBxCV1fjBpRoYAZIBIgoKcHJvamVjdF9pZBIUQhI5Mjk0ODQyMzMxNTg0NzE4OTU&filename=&opi=96797242","mimeType":"text/html"},"id":"5f642d4fe8d046fab9a19cf902668835","generatedBy":"figaro_agent","width":"2560","height":"2048","title":"Modal — Perfil (desde menu)","prompt":"Create a desktop screen showing a Profile Modal OPEN over the home screen.

CONTEXT (DIMMED BACKGROUND):
- Use the SideNavBar component in 'Leadiva Mint Pastel' style.
- Sidebar Brand: Official Leadiva Logo (black rocket icon: {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_28}}) + 'Leadiva' wordmark.
- Sidebar Sections: 'Búsquedas anteriores' list.
- Sidebar Bottom: User avatar 'DM' + 'Diego Murillo Correa'.
- Main Background: A faintly visible centered headline '¿Qué tipo de oportunidades/licitaciones estás buscando?' and a search input.
- Overlay: Entire app is covered by a semi-transparent dark overlay (#1c1917 at 25% opacity).

MODAL (CENTERED & FOCUSED):
- Shape: White rectangular panel, ~750px wide, rounded-md, 1px border #d5e8e0, soft shadow.
- Header: Small 'Perfil' text and a close (X) icon top-right.
- Layout: Two-column layout matching wireframe {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}}.
- Left Column (~35%): A large square container for 'Foto / Avatar'. Style: soft mint fill #d9eedb, rounded, containing a large 'DM' initial or photo placeholder icon.
- Right Column (~65%): Stacked form fields.
    - 'Nombres' label with input field containing 'Diego'.
    - 'Apellidos' label with input field containing 'Murillo Correa'.
    - 'Correo electrónico' label with secondary text 'usuario@creativastudios.us' (non-editable style).
- Inputs: Flat white background, 1px #d5e8e0 border, rounded corners.
- Footer: Bottom-right alignment with 'Cancelar' (ghost/secondary button) and 'Guardar' (primary button #05aba9).

STYLING:
- Strictly 'Leadiva Flat Institutional' - no gradients, no skeuomorphism, no blue/purple.
- Use #05aba9 for primary actions.
- Use #d9eedb for mint backgrounds.
- High readability, professional enterprise look.
- Language: Spanish UI.","name":"projects/929484233158471895/screens/5f642d4fe8d046fab9a19cf902668835","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","colorVariant":"TONAL_SPOT"},"deviceType":"DESKTOP","screenType":"DESIGN","screenMetadata":{"agentType":"PRO_AGENT","status":"COMPLETE"},"designSystem":{"name":"assets/8031487489663830885","designSystem":{"displayName":"Leadiva Mint Pastel","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","designMd":"# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

### Key Features:
- **Wireframe Fidelity**: The modal structure follows the two-column layout from your sketch, with the avatar area on the left and form fields (Nombres, Apellidos, Correo) on the right.
- **Official Branding**: Integrated the black line-art rocket icon and wordmark in the sidebar, which remains visible but dimmed behind the semi-transparent overlay (#1c1917/25).
- **Refined Inputs**: Fields are styled with a clean 1px border (#d5e8e0) and rounded-md corners, avoiding any skeuomorphic or heavy shadow effects.
- **Contextual Shell**: The authenticated shell matches the refined Home screen, featuring the 'Búsquedas anteriores' section and the bottom user profile zone.

The modal is centered and provides clear 'Cancelar' and 'Guardar' actions, using the project's primary teal (#05aba9) for the main CTA."},{"suggestion":"Add a 'Success' state after clicking Guardar"},{"suggestion":"Edit the avatar to show a photo instead of initials"},{"suggestion":"Change the overlay density to make the background more visible"}]}

theme.designMd:
# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

screens.name: projects/929484233158471895/screens/5f642d4fe8d046fab9a19cf902668835
screens.prompt:
Create a desktop screen showing a Profile Modal OPEN over the home screen.

CONTEXT (DIMMED BACKGROUND):
- Use the SideNavBar component in 'Leadiva Mint Pastel' style.
- Sidebar Brand: Official Leadiva Logo (black rocket icon: {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_28}}) + 'Leadiva' wordmark.
- Sidebar Sections: 'Búsquedas anteriores' list.
- Sidebar Bottom: User avatar 'DM' + 'Diego Murillo Correa'.
- Main Background: A faintly visible centered headline '¿Qué tipo de oportunidades/licitaciones estás buscando?' and a search input.
- Overlay: Entire app is covered by a semi-transparent dark overlay (#1c1917 at 25% opacity).

MODAL (CENTERED & FOCUSED):
- Shape: White rectangular panel, ~750px wide, rounded-md, 1px border #d5e8e0, soft shadow.
- Header: Small 'Perfil' text and a close (X) icon top-right.
- Layout: Two-column layout matching wireframe {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}}.
- Left Column (~35%): A large square container for 'Foto / Avatar'. Style: soft mint fill #d9eedb, rounded, containing a large 'DM' initial or photo placeholder icon.
- Right Column (~65%): Stacked form fields.
    - 'Nombres' label with input field containing 'Diego'.
    - 'Apellidos' label with input field containing 'Murillo Correa'.
    - 'Correo electrónico' label with secondary text 'usuario@creativastudios.us' (non-editable style).
- Inputs: Flat white background, 1px #d5e8e0 border, rounded corners.
- Footer: Bottom-right alignment with 'Cancelar' (ghost/secondary button) and 'Guardar' (primary button #05aba9).

STYLING:
- Strictly 'Leadiva Flat Institutional' - no gradients, no skeuomorphism, no blue/purple.
- Use #05aba9 for primary actions.
- Use #d9eedb for mint backgrounds.
- High readability, professional enterprise look.
- Language: Spanish UI.
screens.title: Modal — Perfil (desde menu)

outputComponents.text:
I have created the new profile modal for Diego Murillo Correa, strictly following the provided wireframe and the **Leadiva Flat Institutional** design language.

### Key Features:
- **Wireframe Fidelity**: The modal structure follows the two-column layout from your sketch, with the avatar area on the left and form fields (Nombres, Apellidos, Correo) on the right.
- **Official Branding**: Integrated the black line-art rocket icon and wordmark in the sidebar, which remains visible but dimmed behind the semi-transparent overlay (#1c1917/25).
- **Refined Inputs**: Fields are styled with a clean 1px border (#d5e8e0) and rounded-md corners, avoiding any skeuomorphic or heavy shadow effects.
- **Contextual Shell**: The authenticated shell matches the refined Home screen, featuring the 'Búsquedas anteriores' section and the bottom user profile zone.

The modal is centered and provides clear 'Cancelar' and 'Guardar' actions, using the project's primary teal (#05aba9) for the main CTA.

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a 'Success' state after clicking Guardar
Edit the avatar to show a photo instead of initials
Change the overlay density to make the background more visible
